items.title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
items.summary: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.

items.title: 'We need real peace': Easter truce fails to lift grim mood in war-torn Ukraine
items.summary: Easter festivities are muted in Kharkiv as Ukrainians expect fighting to flare up again after a weekend truce.

items.title: Prosecutor probes abuse claims against California governor candidate Swalwell
items.summary: The high-profile Democrat, a leading contender in California's governor race, firmly denies the accusations.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美伊停火後首次！ 3艘超級油輪滿載駛離荷姆茲海峽
items.summary: 隨著美伊暫時停火，荷姆茲海峽航運開始有復甦跡象，3艘可裝載200桶石油的超級油輪，在11日通過荷姆茲海峽；過去36小時內，至少有10艘船隻通過，還有7艘正在通過中。  綜合外...…

items.title: 扯！法國9歲童被狠父關在車內1年半 與垃圾、排泄物相伴
items.summary: 太離譜！法國檢方11日表示，靠近德國邊界的市鎮阿根巴克（Hagenbach），有1名9歲男童從2024年11月起被父親關在廂型車內．直到本月6日才獲救，男童由於明顯營養不良已送往...…

items.title: 停火死線逼近！ 美伊談21小時仍無共識 下一步「三條路」浮現
items.summary: 美國與伊朗代表進行超過21小時的談判仍未達成協議，外媒指出，雙方面臨的選項已逐漸集中為三條路：包括延長談判、恢復軍事行動，或讓荷姆茲海峽的通行情況持續受限。  根據《紐約時...…
